text.title: Predictive Analytics for PM Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the Predictive Analytics for PM methodology end-to-end.

step.name: validate-data
step.action: Confirm data is clean: no missing timestamps, no orphan transitions.
step.decision-gate: If data is dirty, halt and fix before forecasting.

step.name: baseline-with-monte-carlo
step.action: Run Monte Carlo on throughput; compute P50/P85/P95.

step.name: upgrade-to-ml-if-uplift
step.action: Try ML candidates; keep only if calibration uplift >5%.

step.name: publish-with-calibration
step.action: Publish predictions with calibration score + window + model version.

step.name: close-loop-with-owner
step.action: Decision owner reviews; commits to action OR deprecates cadence.
